title: PaxelJS
description: Adds Paxel support for KubeJS, using the Cucumber Library.
body:
### To use in KubeJS:
```js
StartupEvents.registry('item', event =>{
    event.create('cool_paxel', 'paxel')
})
```
* Available for [**1.20.1**](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxeljs/versions?g=1.20.1), [**1.19.2**](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxeljs/versions?g=1.19.2), [**1.18.2**](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxeljs/versions?g=1.18.2).

* Requires **[KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs), [Cucumber](https://modrinth.com/mod/cucumber)**.

#

Do you want more features from Cucumber? Use [**CucumberJS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cucumberjs)! Supports **Paxels**, **Watering Cans** and more.
